title: Cataclysm: Weapon Skill Config/ Incinerator's Try Hard
description: Let you be able to custom the skill damage/radius/charging time etc. of the Incinerator/The Immolator/Tidal Claws etc.  of L_Ender 's Cataclysm!
body:
L_Ender's Cataclysm has incredibly cool weapons. However, only a few of  weapon skill parameters can be modified in Cataclysm’s configuration file. And the weapon skills' damage, charging time and so on sometimes are not satisfiying enough. 

This mod allows you to modify The Incinerator and some other weapons further through configuration files IncineratorsTryHard.toml.

Currently you can modify:

[The Incinerator]

- Basic Damage of the weapon skill
- Max Health Percent Damage of the weapon skill
- Charging Time to cast the skill
- The Charging Time to form the max magic circle (1.0.1+)
- Radius of Ignis Circles released by the weapon skill (1.0.2+)
  
↓↓ CoolDown = 1, Charging Time = 2 ↓↓

![Power!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74631d0080c3375942e79b2e3cbad21a895fa35e.gif)

[The Immolator] (1.0.2+)

- Basic Damage of the weapon skill
- Max Health Percent Damage of the weapon skill
- Charging Time to cast the skill
- The Charging Time to form the max magic circle
- Radius of Ignis Circles released by the weapon skill
  
[Tidal Claws] (1.0.2+)

- Basic Damage of Tidal Tentacle
- Tentacle's First/Second Detection Range released by Tidal Claws (1.0.4+)
- Hook's Max Range released by Tidal Claws (1.0.4+)
- Hook's Max Speed released by Tidal Claws (1.0.4+)
  
[Gauntlet of Bulwark] (1.0.3+)

- Charge Damage Multiplier

[Bloom Stone Pauldrons] (1.0.4+)

- Cooldown time of Amethyst Cluster Shooting
